videos.headline: UCF completes undefeated season with win over Auburn
videos.description: McKenzie Milton throws two touchdown passes and scores one on the ground as No. 12 UCF upsets No. 7 Auburn 34-27.

videos.headline: Stove warms up Auburn's offense with 7-yard TD
videos.description: Auburn's Eli Stove runs the reverse into the end zone to bring the Tigers' within seven against the Knights.

videos.headline: UCF's defense comes up huge in Peach Bowl win
videos.description: The Knights' defense came up with two clutch interceptions in the 4th quarter to help UCF beat Auburn 34-27 in the Chick-fil-A Peach Bowl.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (UCF's defense comes up huge in Peach Bowl win) 2017/1/1 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Milton loses fumble early
videos.description: UCF's McKenzie Milton mishandles the snap and Auburn jumps on the loose ball to force the first turnover of the Chick-fil-A Peach Bowl.

videos.headline: Slayton plays a down without a shoe
videos.description: After completing a catch for 24 yards Auburn's Darius Slayton plays the next down without his shoe due to the Tigers' quick-tempo offense.

videos.headline: More shoe problems in the Chick-fil-A Peach Bowl
videos.description: An untied shoes forces UCF's high tempo offense to slow down as quarterback McKenzie Milton has to pause to tie it.

videos.headline: UCF hops on lose ball
videos.description: Auburn's Jarrett Stidham has the ball poked out of his hands and UCF's A.J. Wooten makes a big return to help set up the Knights' offense.

videos.headline: Milton scores first TD of Chick-fil-A Peach Bowl
videos.description: UCF's McKenzie Milton keeps the ball and runs 18 yards to give the Knights the first touchdown of the game.

videos.headline: Griffin sacks Stidham
videos.description: UCF's linebacker Shaquem Griffin, who is one-handed, comes up strong for the Knights by sacking Auburn's Jarrett Stidham.

videos.headline: UCF starting to frustrate Auburn
videos.description: After a Kerryon Johnson run, things get chippy as Tre Neal and Chandler Cox exchange words.

videos.headline: Auburn capitalizes with TD
videos.description: Jarrett Stidham finds Will Hastings in the end zone for the 26-yard touchdown as Auburn comes out strong in the 3rd quarter.

videos.headline: Auburn starts second half with big kickoff return
videos.description: Auburn begins the seconds half with a 72-yard kickoff return to help spark the Tigers' offense.

videos.headline: Slayton adjusts to make the catch
videos.description: Auburn's Jarrett Stidham connects with Darius Slayton, who makes the difficult catch, for a gain of 29 yards.

videos.headline: Johnson TD gives Auburn the lead
videos.description: Kerryon Johnson runs in for a 4-yard touchdown to give the Tigers the lead over UCF.

videos.headline: Akins makes the catch in traffic
videos.description: UCF's Jordan Akins makes the grab through great coverage to get 26 yards for the Knights.

videos.headline: UCF's Anderson muscles in for TD
videos.description: Otis Anderson carries the Auburn defense into the end zone to cap off a 12-yard touchdown run.

videos.headline: UCF runs the trick play to perfection to take lead
videos.description: UCF's McKenzie Milton fakes the reverse and makes the throw to Dredrick Snelson for the 8-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: UCF gets a jolt after TD
videos.description: Players recreate a defibrillator with footballs to show the revitalization of the Knights' offense in the Chick-fil-A Peach Bowl.

videos.headline: Milton breaks open big run
videos.description: UCF's McKenzie Milton scrambles for a 23-yard gain to keep the momentum for the Knights.

videos.headline: Brown suplexes Killins Jr.
videos.description: Auburn's Derrick Brown lifts up UCF's Adrian Killins Jr. and brings him to the ground.

videos.headline: Pick-six gives Knights comfortable lead in 4th
videos.description: UCF's Chequan Burkett comes up with a clutch interception and takes it back to the house for a 45-yard pick-six.

videos.headline: Gibson ejected for targeting
videos.description: UCF's Kyle Gibson is tossed from the game for the targeting penalty for his hit on Auburn's Will Hastings.

videos.headline: Frost praises strong defense
videos.description: Scott Frost speaks highly of UCF's defense as it forced five sacks in the first half against Auburn.

videos.headline: Frost reflects on undefeated season
videos.description: Before he moves on the Nebraska, Scott Frost speaks on how proud he is of the Knights as they cap off an undefeated season by taking down Auburn in the Chick-fil-A Peach Bowl.

videos.headline: Milton jokes; 'They should cancel the playoffs'
videos.description: After being named the Chick-fil-A Peach Bowl most outstanding player, UCF QB McKenzie Milton jokes that they should "cancel" the CFP after the Knights went undefeated without an invite.

videos.headline: Griffin; ' I feel like I'm on top of the world'
videos.description: UCF's Shaquem Griffin gets emotional after the Knights' bowl victory over Auburn and winning the Most Valuable Defensive player.

videos.headline: Frost gets emotional after Chick-fil-A Peach Bowl victory
videos.description: Future Nebraska head coach Scott Frost fights back tears when speaking about the Knights' undefeated season and getting the victory over Auburn.

videos.headline: UCF's defense makes game-sealing interception
videos.description: Knights' Antwan Collier makes the crucial interception of Jarrett Stidham in the final seconds of the Chick-fil-A Peach Bowl to seal a win and undefeated season for UCF.
